FX.title: [USD/JPY] SIDESIDE: ECB Hawkish Pivot Meets BOJ Caution Amid Middle East Risk
tldr_points: ECB June hike probability supports USD
BOJ cautious stance caps upside momentum
Middle East tensions create volatility floor
FX.excerpt: Range-bound USD/JPY as ECB hawkishness offsets BOJ dovishness with geopolitical risk premium.
FX.comment: Range-bound awaiting ECB June policy clarity against BOJ caution

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: Iran Peace Hopes Boost Semiconductor Momentum
tldr_points: Iran peace hopes reduce geopolitical risk, supporting risk‑on sentiment.
Healthcare ETF resilience signals defensive strength amid sector rotation.
Semiconductor rally reflects strong tech fundamentals and improving supply chain dynamics.
STOCKS.excerpt: Iran peace hopes and tech strength lift S&P 500 outlook; look for long entry near current levels with risk control.
STOCKS.comment: Geopolitical easing and tech strength support a bullish bias with defined risk levels.
